title: Create: Blocks & Bogies
description: Add larger train bogies with (and without) valve gear, and more
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/09886c9c85bfa8b2643d20f5e23f9e948697b95f.png) --- A Create addon that adds an abundance of different bogie styles to choose from, adding a selection UI to allow for fine tuning to the users style preference. ## Interactive Bogie Customisation UI ![MenuGif](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/93cf9f8f160d3e98bcdfaad56d65debbdfe3947a.gif) ## Bogie Configuration Options Include: - Walschaerts, Gearless, Pistonless, Rodless, Scotch Yoke Drivers
- Single axle up to 5 (Extra Large drivers) or 6 (Large drivers)
- Standard Small Truck Bogies (1 axle up to 5)
- Trailing Small (1 axle up to 4)
- With more to come... --- # Frequently Asked Questions:
"Do I need Steam n Rails as well?" No, this mod doesn't require SNR to function, though you will still need Create 6.0+
"Will there be a 0.5.1 port?" No - Too much was changed internally, trying to port this mod to 0.5.1 would give us brain aneurisms :)
”Will you add narrow/broad gauge bogies?” No - narrow and broad gauge are Steam n Rails territory, and as such will not be added to BnB
"How do I open the bogie menu?" Hold Crouch and right click the bogie block with an empty hand
---













--- ## Want some building materials? **Check out [Pretty In Pink](https://modrinth.com/mod/pretty-in-pink)!**
